bench_setup.notes: UART loopback test. USART1 sends {0x55, 0xAA, 0x12, 0x34} and reads back each byte over PA9→PA10 loopback at 115200 8N1. On FAIL: error_code bits 0-3 indicate which byte mismatched or timed out. detail0 = matched byte count. On PASS detail0 starts at 4 and increments each ms.

peripheral_signals.notes: USART1 TX, AF7, 115200 8N1. Wire: PA9 → PA10.
USART1 RX, AF7. Wire: PA9 → PA10.
